infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Time Mapper uses your location to detect when you arrive at a place you've saved — so it can start the timer automatically. Your location stays on your device.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Time Mapper uses Always location so it can start and stop timers automatically when you enter or leave your saved places — even with the app closed. Your location never leaves your device.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Time Mapper uses Always location so it can start and stop timers automatically when you enter or leave your saved places — even with the app closed. Your location never leaves your device.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Time Mapper sends a short confirmation when it starts or stops a timer automatically.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Time Mapper uses Always location so it can start and stop timers automatically when you enter or leave your saved places — even with the app closed. Your location never leaves your device.
